data.title: Shanshan Brand Management Faces Mandatory Cash Offer by Major Shareholder
data.description:
The latest update is out from Shanshan Brand Management Co. Ltd. Class H ( (HK:1749) ).

Shanshan Brand Management Co., Ltd. announced a mandatory conditional cash offer by Mr. Luoyefei for all H shares and domestic shares not already owned by him or his concert parties. The acceptance level for the H Share Offer was 1.46% of the total issued H Shares, while there were no valid acceptances for the Domestic Share Offer. Prior to the offer, Mr. Luoyefei held significant shares in the company, and following the completion of the offer period, the concert group owned approximately 39% of the total issued shares. This move could potentially consolidate Mr. Luoyefei’s control over the company, impacting its strategic direction and stakeholder interests.
